title: Plan Sync saved groups — select, edit, and delete
description:
Saved Plan Sync groups now use click-to-select with a clear green highlight. Edit and Delete buttons sit in the top-right of the Saved groups panel — faded and disabled until you pick a group. Edit loads the group into the builder so you can rename it, add or remove PSR jobsites and PDF plans, then Save changes. Right-click still offers Edit and Delete as a shortcut.

Who is affected: PipeSync users using Plan Sync on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Click a saved group to select it — green highlight shows your choice.
Edit and Delete buttons in Saved groups header — enabled only after selection.
Edit mode: rename group, add/remove jobsites and PDFs, Save changes or Cancel.
Status line and tooltips guide each step; right-click menu still works.
Prior fixes: Plan Sync button, download HUD overlay, marketing mobile chips.
